    A

    advancePosition(int) - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Advances the current expression position.
    ANY - Static variable in class edu.iu.util.el.ElUtils
    Character to indicate any control character
    apply(JsonValue, ElContext, Deque) - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate
    Applies this template to an evaluation result and schedules completion of the rendered output.
    apply(StringBuilder, boolean, JsonValue, JsonValue, ElContext, Deque) - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate
    Appends this template's static content and schedules its expressions for evaluation.

    C

    complete() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Completes evaluation of this context.
    CONTROL_CHARS - Static variable in class edu.iu.util.el.ElUtils
    Control characters

    E

    edu.iu.util.el - package edu.iu.util.el
    Provides a compact expression and template language over Jakarta JSON values, intended for rendering thin views from module or class-path resources.
    El - Class in edu.iu.util.el
    Evaluates a compact expression and template language over Jakarta JSON values.
    ElContext - Class in edu.iu.util.el
    Mutable state for evaluating one EL expression.
    ElContext(ElContext, boolean, JsonValue, JsonValue, String, Consumer) - Constructor for class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Creates a child evaluation context for a value, optionally within an iteration.
    ElContext(ElContext, JsonValue, String, Consumer) - Constructor for class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Creates a child evaluation context.
    ElContext(JsonValue, String) - Constructor for class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Creates a root evaluation context.
    ElTemplate - Class in edu.iu.util.el
    Parsed representation of an EL template.
    ElTemplate(String) - Constructor for class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate
    Parses template content.
    ElTemplate.Expression - Record Class in edu.iu.util.el
    A parsed expression and its insertion point in expression-free template content.
    ElUtils - Class in edu.iu.util.el
    Internal parsing and JSON-selection operations shared by the expression evaluator.
    EMPTY - Static variable in class edu.iu.util.el.ElUtils
    Empty JsonString
    equals(Object) - Method in record class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate.Expression
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    ESC_TOKEN - Static variable in class edu.iu.util.el.ElUtils
    Escape character
    eval(JsonValue, String) - Static method in class edu.iu.util.el.El
    Evaluate an expression within a given context.
    eval(JsonValue, String, Function) - Static method in class edu.iu.util.el.El
    Evaluate an expression within a given context.
    eval(String) - Static method in class edu.iu.util.el.El
    Evaluate an expression with no context.
    expression() - Method in record class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate.Expression
    Returns the value of the expression record component.
    Expression(int, String) - Constructor for record class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate.Expression
    Creates an instance of a Expression record class.

    G

    getCloseBracket(String, int) - Static method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElUtils
    Finds the closing bracket for a bracketed expression while accounting for nested bracket pairs.
    getContext() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns the JSON value against which this expression is evaluated.
    getExpression() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns the unconsumed portion of the expression.
    getIndex() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns the index JSON value of the context.
    getIndexFrom(String, char, int) - Static method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElUtils
    Finds the index of a character in a string, starting from a given position, while skipping over inline template blocks (<`...`}).
    getParent() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns the parent context.
    getPosition() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns the offset of the next unconsumed expression character.
    getResult() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns the effective result of this context.
    getRoot() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns the root JSON value of the context.
    getThis() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns the current result without applying match evaluation.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate.Expression
    Returns a hash code value for this object.

    I

    insertPoint() - Method in record class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate.Expression
    Returns the value of the insertPoint record component.
    isEmpty() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Determines whether the expression has any unconsumed characters.
    isHead() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Determines whether this context represents the first item in an iteration.
    isIntrospect() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Determines whether template render should introspect properties.
    isRaw() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Determines whether default result escaping is disabled.
    iu.util.el - module iu.util.el
    Provides a compact expression and template language over Jakarta JSON values.

    M

    markAsIntrospect() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Sets template render to introspect each property individually.
    markAsRaw() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Disables default HTML escaping for this context's result.

    S

    select(JsonValue, JsonValue) - Static method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElUtils
    Selects a JSON value using a subexpression result as the path element.
    select(JsonValue, String) - Static method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElUtils
    Selects a value from a JSON object or array.
    setMatchResult(JsonValue) - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Enables match evaluation using the supplied expected value.
    setPositionAtEnd() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Moves the current position to the end of the expression.
    setResult(JsonValue) - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Sets the current result without changing the current JSON context.

    T

    toString() - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Returns a diagnostic representation showing the current expression position and parent chain.
    toString() - Method in record class edu.iu.util.el.ElTemplate.Expression
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    trim(int) - Method in class edu.iu.util.el.ElContext
    Removes characters beginning at the current expression position.
